meta.title: Fighter Pilot Helicopter Rescue over Ocean
meta.description:
F-35 fighter pilot is rescued in the ocean by the US Coast Guard along with an elite rescue swimmer.


WIN A FLIGHT IN A REAL FIGHTER JET 👉  https://www.hasardlee.com/book

Every 100th person wins a PATCH:  https://www.professionalsplaybook.com/patchgiveaway

If you're an organization that would like to partner on a video, reach out to hasard@hasardlee(dot)com

📷 Produced by: Nicole Livering, and Michael Cunningham. 

SUBSCRIBE for regular videos▶ https://www.youtube.com/c/HasardLee

HOW TO CONNECT
LinkedIn-- https://www.linkedin.com/in/hasardlee
Instagram-- https://www.instagram.com/hasardlee/
Facebook--https://www.facebook.com/hasardlee
Email--hasard@hasardlee(dot)com

🎙 Listen to the Podcast-- https://www.professionalsplaybook.com/listen


Intro - 0:00
Mission- 1:00
Dolphin Flight- 1:24
Jet Ski on Steroids - 0:51
Elite Rescue Swimmer - 3:39
The Rescue- 4:58

*Crew would have likely operationally hoisted Hasard with a litter rather than the basket (in case of a back injury), but didn’t for various logistical reasons*
